overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a cloaked character walking through a fantasy landscape with golden autumn trees and corrupted red skies, transitioning to a night scene with a large crescent moon. The character traverses a grassy field with scattered stone ruins and passes fallen bodies on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy field with stone ruins and golden glowing trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a grassy path toward distant stone ruins under a reddish sky

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence posts lining the left side of the path
large stone archway ruins on a distant hill
tall tree with bright golden yellow glowing leaves
vertical beam of golden light emanating from behind the ruins
narrow dirt trail through tall green and yellow grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a grassy path through an open field during a reddish dusk. Wooden fences line the sides while distant stone ruins and glowing golden trees stand against a corrupted sky filled with floating red embers.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy field with fallen soldiers and scattered debris

events.description: character passes several dead soldier bodies lying on the grass to the left of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past fallen soldiers and wooden debris toward the stone ruins

entered.detail: corpses of soldiers lying on the ground beside the path
scattered wooden logs and debris on the left side
tall stone tower visible in the far left distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the field, passing fallen soldier bodies and wooden debris scattered near the path. The stone ruins grow slightly closer in the distance while the sky begins its transition toward night.

scene_state.functional_zone: nighttime field with large crescent moon

events.description: sky transitions from red dusk to deep night with a large crescent moon becoming visible
camera tilts upward to gaze at the large crescent moon before returning to forward view

agents.ego_description: walking forward while looking up at the moon, then continuing along the path

entered.detail: massive bright crescent moon dominating the night sky
deep blue and black night sky with stars

segments.scene_description: Night falls as a massive crescent moon rises against a deep blue sky. The character pauses to look up at the moon before continuing through the field, with the golden trees now glowing brightly against the dark surroundings and the stone ruins drawing closer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open field that transforms from a corrupted reddish dusk into a luminous moonlit night. It begins with the character walking along a grassy path lined with wooden fences, where glowing golden trees stand against a sky filled with floating red embers. As the character progresses, the camera passes fallen soldier bodies and wooden debris scattered across the terrain while the distant stone ruins gradually draw closer. The scene then shifts as the red sky deepens into a dark blue, culminating in the rise of a massive crescent moon that casts a cold light over the landscape. Finally, the character pauses to look upward before continuing toward the ruins, with the golden trees now glowing intensely against the surrounding darkness.
